use q.as_projective
  constructor
  · -- Show that `as_projective q` is `ok proj`
    rfl
  · -- Show the conversion formulas hold
    simp [p]
    <;> try { native_decide }

use {X := q.X.val * q.T.val, Y := q.Y.val * q.Z.val, Z := q.Z.val * q.T.val}
  constructor
  · -- Show that q.as_projective = ok this
    rfl
  · -- Show the congruences hold
    simp

use {
    X := q.X.map (fun i => (q.X[i]! * q.T[i]!) % p),
    Y := q.Y.map (fun i => (q.Y[i]! * q.Z[i]!) % p),
    Z := q.Z.map (fun i => (q.Z[i]! * q.T[i]!) % p)
  }
  constructor
  · -- Show that q.as_projective is ok with the constructed projective point
    rw [as_projective]
    simp
  · -- Show that the coordinates satisfy the required congruences
    intro i hi
    simp [Int.ofNat]
    <;> ring_nf
    <;> omega

use q.as_projective.get
  constructor
  · -- Show that q.as_projective = ok (q.as_projective.get)
    simpa using q.as_projective.isOk
  · -- Show the modular arithmetic relations
    let X := Field51_as_Nat q.X
    let Y := Field51_as_Nat q.Y
    let Z := Field51_as_Nat q.Z
    let T := Field51_as_Nat q.T
    let X' := Field51_as_Nat (q.as_projective.get).X
    let Y' := Field51_as_Nat (q.as_projective.get).Y
    let Z' := Field51_as_Nat (q.as_projective.get).Z
    simp [q.as_projective] at *
    <;> try { native_decide }

use q.as_projective.toProjective
  constructor
  · -- Show that `as_projective q = ok proj`
    simpa using q.as_projective.isOk
  · -- Show the congruences
    have h1 : (q.as_projective.toProjective).X % p = (q.X[0]! * q.T[0]!) % p := by
      simp [q.as_projective]
    have h2 : (q.as_projective.toProjective).Y % p = (q.Y[0]!) % p := by
      simp [q.as_projective]
    have h3 : (q.as_projective.toProjective).Z % p = (q.T[0]!) % p := by
      simp [q.as_projective]
    simp [h1, h2, h3]
    <;> aesop

use ⟨q.X * q.T, q.Y * q.Z, q.Z * q.T⟩
  constructor
  · -- Show that as_projective q = ok proj
    rfl
  · -- Show that the coordinates satisfy the modular equations
    simp [Nat.mul_mod, Nat.add_mod, Nat.pow_mod]
    <;> ring_nf <;> omega
